title: J8Wz4U6Q3Lzp1Pv46Y4L6Tbri1Ka12
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
US jobs data have thrown the central bank's decision to cut rates aggressively into question. Inflation risks further rise due to geopolitical tensions, even as the global economy slows. For one, they should accept that in a post-QE economy, many more opinions will be heard, and positioning around monetary policy and its outcomes will become more spread.
